heading: Foreign language proficiency pay awards for the Federal Bureau of Investigation
label: 5761 Foreign language proficiency pay awards for the Federal Bureau of Investigation
text: The Director of the Federal Bureau of Investigation may, under regulations prescribed by the Director, pay a cash award of up to 10 percent of basic pay to any Bureau employee who maintains proficiency in a language or languages critical to the mission or who uses one or more foreign languages in the performance of official duties.
